response: Define the study objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Identify the target population to gather data from relevant groups and ensure data quality remains consistent. Collect data through surveys or interviews to obtain data that reflects the health status of the population. Store data securely to maintain data integrity and allow for future data retrieval. Analyze data using statistical methods to interpret data patterns and trends. Validate data accuracy to ensure data reliability and prevent data misinterpretation. Interpret data findings to draw conclusions about data relationships and health outcomes. Share data results with stakeholders to inform data-driven public health decisions.
